positive: A whimsical, stylized silhouette of a large, crescent moon hanging low over a stylized landscape. Below the moon, a group of leaping, fantastical creatures—like stylized foxes, small deer, and soaring owls—are depicted in dynamic, interconnected poses, all rendered in solid, clean black ink against a cream-colored background. The composition is highly centralized and balanced, creating a strong graphic contrast and negative space. The style is inspired by elegant Art Nouveau linocuts and contemporary mid-century graphic design. Lighting is implied by the stark black silhouette against the pale background. Focus on clean, bold lines, perfect symmetry where applicable, and a printable, repeatable pattern quality.
negative: blur, low detail, grayscale, photo, realistic, gradient, smudge, watermark, text, lettering, logo, signature, artist name, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, messy lines
